    OUR MENU

    Before placing your order, please inform if a person in your party has a food allergy. Prices and menu are subject to change without notice. The FDA advises consuming raw or undercook meats, poultry, seafood or eggs increases your risk of food borne illness. We reserve the right to correct any errors. Dear customer, all of our dishes are prepared at the moment and may take some time depending on their seasoning. We kindly ask for your understanding.
